display.purpose: Hero H1 only. Fraunces 500; italic words drop to 400 in coral.

body.purpose: Paragraph text in muted ink; 62–75ch measure.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked micro-labels and the coral-dash eyebrow kicker.

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Default resting lift on cards, active lang pill, icon tiles.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus/featured state — a surface rising toward the reader.

motion.name: ease-house
motion.purpose: The one house easing (ease-out) for every transition and reveal.

motion.name: hover-lift
motion.purpose: Interactive rise on buttons and cards, paired with ambient-rest → ambient-lift.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The grounding CTA — deep teal fill, cream text, full pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: .96rem; line-height: 1.1; color: #FAF8F2; background: #23413A; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 100px; padding: .82rem 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(45,80,71,.06); cursor: pointer; transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), box-shadow .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), background .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1A332D; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(45,80,71,.10); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8FBBAA; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Coral Button
components.description: The warm, high-intent CTA — coral fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-coral { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: .96rem; line-height: 1.1; color: #fff; background: #C9705E; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 100px; padding: .82rem 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), box-shadow .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), background .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-btn-coral:hover { background: #B5604F; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(45,80,71,.10); } .ds-btn-coral:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #23413A; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with a mint hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: .96rem; line-height: 1.1; color: #23413A; background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #B4D3C4; border-radius: 100px; padding: .82rem 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), border-color .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), background .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #8FBBAA; background: rgba(255,255,255,.5); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8FBBAA; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Eyebrow Kicker
components.description: The signature Coral Dash — the recurring section 'you are here' marker.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem; margin: 0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: .74rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C9705E; } .ds-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 26px; height: 2px; background: #E9A899; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Lesson Card
components.description: White surface, hairline mint border, soft lift on hover; image bleeds to the card edge.
components.html:
01

Groepsles

Kleine groepjes van maximum 6, board en wetsuit inbegrepen.

Beginners
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(180,211,196,.4); border-radius: 22px; padding: 1.9rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(45,80,71,.06); transition: transform .3s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), box-shadow .3s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(45,80,71,.10); } .ds-card-num { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .05em; color: #C9705E; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.4rem; color: #23413A; margin: .2rem 0 .5rem; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: .96rem; line-height: 1.68; color: #4C635C; } .ds-card-tag { display: inline-block; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: .76rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8FBBAA; background: #DCEDE4; padding: .3rem .7rem; border-radius: 100px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Cream-filled field that recedes into the paper; focus brightens to white with a seafoam border.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8FBBAA; margin-bottom: .4rem; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: .85rem 1rem; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #23413A; background: #FAF8F2; border: 1.5px solid #B4D3C4; border-radius: 14px; transition: border-color .2s, background .2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6A827A; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #8FBBAA; background: #fff; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Ink link with a coral underline that grows left-to-right on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: .93rem; font-weight: 500; color: #23413A; text-decoration: none; padding: .3rem 0; transition: color .25s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -2px; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #E9A899; border-radius: 2px; transition: width .3s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #C9705E; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: FAQ Disclosure
components.description: White card with a mint chevron that rotates to a coral '+' when open.
components.html:
Heb ik ervaring nodig?+

Nee — de meeste leerlingen staan voor het eerst op een board.
components.css: .ds-faq { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(180,211,196,.45); border-radius: 22px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(45,80,71,.06); } .ds-faq-sum { cursor: pointer; list-style: none; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #23413A; } .ds-faq-sum::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-faq-chev { flex: none; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: #DCEDE4; color: #23413A; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 1rem; transition: transform .3s cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1), background .3s; } .ds-faq[open] .ds-faq-chev { transform: rotate(45deg); background: #F5D3CA; } .ds-faq-body { padding: 0 1.5rem 1.3rem; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: .96rem; line-height: 1.68; color: #4C635C; } .ds-faq-body p { margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Coco Surf School is a small-group surf school on the Landes coast, and the site should feel the way the school promises to feel: an unhurried exhale by the ocean. The whole system is built around a pale, sea-washed calm — mint and cream carrying the surfaces, a warm coral surfacing only where the eye should go. Nothing shouts. Density is low, whitespace is generous, and the reading rhythm is slow on purpose. The character is editorial-pastel: a Fraunces serif carries every heading with a quiet, humanist warmth, set against a clean system sans for body. Depth is barely-there — soft, teal-tinted shadows that lift a card a few pixels rather than dropping it into a hole. This system explicitly rejects the loud SaaS-landing register (dark heroes, neon gradients, glassmorphism, hero-metric templates) and equally rejects sterile minimalism; warmth is carried by palette, serif, and imagery, never by an aggressive layout.
keyCharacteristics: Pale seafoam-and-cream base; coral as a rare, directional accent.
Fraunces serif for all headings; humanist and warm, never stern.
Soft, low, teal-tinted elevation — surfaces lift gently, never drop.
Pill geometry (100px) for every interactive shape; 22–34px rounding for surfaces.
Generous whitespace and slow reading rhythm; calm is the product.

rules.name: The One Coral Rule
rules.body: Coral (coral-deep and its tints) is the only directional accent and appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point — the moment two coral things compete, the pointing stops working.

rules.name: The Grounded-Not-Black Rule
rules.body: There is no pure black and no pure-neutral gray. Ink is teal (#23413A), text is teal-gray (#4C635C), shadows are teal-tinted. Reaching for #000 or a neutral #888 breaks the coastal warmth.

rules.name: The Coral Dash Rule
rules.body: The section eyebrow is a deliberate, named brand system: uppercase 0.74rem label, 0.28em tracking, coral-deep, preceded by a 26×2px coral dash. Keep it identical everywhere it appears — a drifting or restyled eyebrow reads as an accident.

rules.name: The Serif-Carries-It Rule
rules.body: All headings are Fraunces; the body sans is intentionally mute. Never introduce a second display face — contrast is serif-vs-sans and weight, not a new family.

rules.name: The Gentle-Lift Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest at shadow-sm and rise to shadow-md with a translateY(-2px to -4px) on hover. Elevation is a response to interaction, not decoration at rest. No shadow is ever darker or tighter than shadow-md.

dos: Do keep coral rare and directional — links, the eyebrow, one CTA, emphasis. If two coral elements compete on a screen, demote one.
Do set every heading in Fraunces and let italic-coral carry emphasis inside a headline.
Do ground the system in teal, not black: #23413A ink, #4C635C body, teal-tinted shadows.
Do keep elevation soft and reactive — shadow-sm at rest, shadow-md + a 2–4px lift on hover, nothing darker.
Do use the pill (100px) for every interactive shape and 22–34px rounding for surfaces.
Do keep the eyebrow kicker identical everywhere it appears; its consistency is what makes it a system rather than noise.
Do cap body measure at 62–75ch and lead paragraphs at ~56ch; the slow reading rhythm is part of the calm.
donts: Don't use seafoam (#8FBBAA) for small body or long-form text on white/cream — it falls below the 4.5:1 contrast floor. Keep seafoam for short uppercase labels only; use ink-soft for anything meant to be read.
Don't introduce a second display typeface or a mono 'for technical feel' — this brand isn't technical.
Don't reach for a dark hero, neon gradient, glassmorphic card, or the big-number hero-metric template.
Don't use pure black (#000) or a neutral gray (#888) anywhere; it drains the coastal warmth.
Don't let the eyebrow drift — a restyled, differently-tracked, or recolored kicker reads as an accident. If it can't be identical, drop it for that section instead.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes on cards or callouts; use full hairline borders, mint/coral-soft tint fills, or leading labels instead.
Don't harden the shadows — a tight, near-black drop shadow is the fastest way to make this system look like a generic 2014 app.
